items.title: 49ers Mourn Sudden Death Of Former All-Pro Linebacker Aldon Smith At 36
items.summary: Aldon Smith, a former All-Pro linebacker for the San Francisco 49ers whose playing career was sidetracked by legal issues, has died at 36.
